body.title: Build audit-debris (rename + fold validate-files + own docs-update)
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/audit-debris/SKILL.md: 10 checks (temp files, runtime staged, .env, debug artifacts, log growth, test DB rows, file placement, docstring rot, subsystem_index, commented code). Model: Haiku.
body.description:
audit-debris is the post-test, pre-commit cleanup layer. Folds /validate-files in. Owns docs-update at PR time (NOT day's-end — change is fresh, file is open).

Checks: .tmp/.bak/.swp/__pycache__/*.pyc; runtime files staged (~/.TheIgors/* or *.db); .env changes uncommunicated in commit message; debug print()/breakpoint()/import pdb (covered by inherit-base-class+preferred_paths but double-check); log-size growth from new code (sample new log lines); test cleanup (tables/rows left in test DB after suite); file placement (runtime under ~/.TheIgors/, code under wild_igor/); top-of-file docstring updated for changed load-bearing files; subsystem_index updated when load-bearing primary file moves.

Emits per-run record. Model: Haiku.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/audit-debris/SKILL.md (renamed from validate-files, extended). Helper logic from validate-files folded in.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry.
**Test plan:** pre-commit run with a stray .tmp file → flagged. Diff that changes a load-bearing file but not its docstring → AMEND. Test run that leaves rows in test DB → flagged. Telemetry recorded.
